title: OPMatica
description:
Enhances the use of Litematica on OPSUCHT with additional features.
(Unofficial Addon)
body:
### 🎨 Spraymatic
 - **For the best experience with Spraymatic, make sure to have all color variants of the required spray cans in your inventory.**

- Ever built a large map, pixel art, or colorful megabuild? The Spraymatic automatically reads your loaded Litematica schematic and colors the block wherever you point, whether it's wool, concrete, terracotta, or glass. No more manually swapping colors block by block.

### 🛒 EasyMarket
- The EasyMarket detects which block is needed next according to your schematic and checks if you have it in your inventory, if not it will open the OPSUCHT Markt if the Item is available to buy, keeping your building flow smooth and uninterrupted.

### ⚙️ Commands
- /opmatica spraymatic toggle         |  _Enable/disable the spraymatica_
- /opmatica spraymatic mode           |  _Switch between Schematic and Paint mode_
- /opmatica spraymatic color <color>  |  _Set the paint color (e.g. red, blue)_
- /opmatica easymarket toggle           |  _Enable/disable EasyMarket_

### ⌨️ Keybinds
- **All keybinds can be found and customized under the OPMatica category in your Minecraft keybind settings.**

- Spray Block | _Spray the block you're looking at_
- Toggle Spray Mode | _Switch between Schematic and Paint mode_
- Paint Color: Next | _Cycle to the next color_
- Paint Color: Previous | _Cycle to the previous color_
